review_summary: setState in render = infinite loop. React limit reached.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Derive over store; unconditional setState = infinite loop.

review_summary: No cleanup. Component unmount leaves stale title.
Two setStates = two renders. Plus if a affects b's fetch (it doesn't here), sequential needed.

issues_found.title: Two renders
issues_found.explanation: Sequential = two renders. Parallel would be better.

code_under_review:
import { User, fetchUser } from './api';
import type { Profile } from './types';
review_summary: User might be type-only too. Mixed import.

issues_found.title: Cleaner with type prefix
issues_found.explanation: Mark types as 'type' for clarity and tree-shake.

code_under_review:
<button onClick={() => setOpen(!open)}>
  Menu <ChevronDown />
</button>
review_summary: No aria-expanded. No aria-haspopup.
fixed_code: ...

review_summary: Module-init reads localStorage. SSR crash. Plus zustand has persist middleware.
Field-level errors don't clear when user edits. Stale.

issues_found.title: Stale on edit
issues_found.explanation: User fixes email but error persists until next submit.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Clear errors on edit; RHF handles.

code_under_review: {content}
review_summary: h-0 to h-auto doesn't animate. Standard issue.
fixed_code: {content}

code_under_review: import { User, Order, Product } from '@org/api-types';
review_summary: If User/Order/Product are types only, regular import may include runtime overhead or fail tree-shake.
fixed_code: import type { User, Order, Product } from '@org/api-types';

code_under_review: Section error}> Widget error}>
review_summary: Inner catches widget errors. Outer would catch other errors. Pattern OK.

issues_found.title: Pattern correct
issues_found.explanation: Nested boundaries for layered error handling is correct.

fixed_code:
// Already correct pattern
<ErrorBoundary fallback={<SectionErrorUI />} onError={logSectionError}>
  <ErrorBoundary fallback={<WidgetErrorUI />} onError={logWidgetError}>
    <Widget />
  </ErrorBoundary>
  {/* Sibling widgets unaffected by widget error */}
  <OtherWidget />
</ErrorBoundary>

review_summary: refresh in deps recreates interval on every parent render.
Side effect in render. Fires every render including strict mode double.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Side effects in effects, not render.

review_summary: Client-only check. AdminPanel data must be server-side authorized.

issues_found.title: Security theater
issues_found.explanation: User can modify state to set role=admin. Server must authorize endpoints.

broader_pattern: Defense in depth; server is source of auth.

code_under_review: const [isMobile] = useState(window.innerWidth < 768);
review_summary: window in initial = SSR crash.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Browser API after mount; reactive via matchMedia.

review_summary: Source maps public = source code readable by anyone.

issues_found.title: Source exposed
issues_found.explanation: Public source maps reveal original code.

broader_pattern: Hidden source maps; upload to Sentry.

review_summary: useContext returns whole value. Theme change re-renders CartIcon.

issues_found.title: All consumers re-render on any change

review_summary: No cleanup. Recursion continues forever even after unmount.
Loser doesn't get canceled. Underlying fetch continues after timeout.
Returns boolean not type predicate. No narrowing.

code_under_review: ...
review_summary: DnD inaccessible to keyboard. No keyboard alternative.

scenario: Form state in URL during typing.
review_summary: URL updates every keystroke. History spam.
what_makes_this_review_senior: replace vs push; debounce URL writes.

review_summary: Two requests. Race: between check and save, another user could claim. Server should handle atomically.

issues_found.title: TOCTOU race
issues_found.explanation: Time-of-check vs time-of-use. Another user could take email between requests.

review_summary: Stacks rAF per scroll event. No throttle.

issues_found.title: Stacked rAFs
issues_found.explanation: Scroll fires often. Each schedules rAF. Pile-up.

review_summary: PNG for icon. SVG smaller, scalable, colorable.

issues_found.title: SVG better
issues_found.explanation: PNG: bigger, fixed size, can't color.

review_summary: Strict mode in dev double-invokes effect. Two beacons.

issues_found.title: Double in strict mode
issues_found.explanation: React 18 strict mode invokes effect twice in dev. Two beacons sent.

broader_pattern: Side effects in effects must be idempotent.
